criteria.criterion: tests/interfaces/test_metrics_cli.py passes: rebar metrics --since 2026-01-01 --until 2026-07-01 --output json exits 0 and emits .metrics map for EVERY id in REGISTRY. Test first asserts REGISTRY non-empty, then set(output["metrics"].keys()) >= {s.id for s in REGISTRY}, each entry being a value (lens+source+confidence) or unavailable with non-empty reason.
--output text prints one line per registered metric id — CLI test asserts every id appears and an unavailable metric renders as unavailable.
The portability guard holds: a test asserts src/rebar/_commands/metrics.py source does not import rebar.metrics.adapters.
rebar metrics --help renders the help file and the command is listed by bare rebar — CLI test asserts exit 0 and help contains --since.
The golden CLI-help snapshots are regenerated (and docs/cli-reference.md via gen_cli_reference.py), and the tests/golden/cli_help + help-overview-coverage suites pass with metrics listed.
